---
title: Laura Avellaneda
image: ../people-images/laura-avellaneda.jpeg
started: 2017
subtitle: "MSc. Student"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: ../people-images/laura-avellaneda.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com
---
